name: Asian Hotels (North) Limited
summary: Asian Hotels (North) Limited engages in hospitality/hotel business in India. The company owns and operates Hyatt Regency Delhi, a five-star deluxe hotel, which includes 507 rooms and suites, spa, unisex salon, fitness center, restaurant, bar, and outdoor swimming pool in New Delhi. It also operates two wind turbine generators in Maharashtra. In addition, the company provides offshore project consultancy services; and develops villa hotel complex, including residential villas and golf course in Goa. Asian Hotels (North) Limited was incorporated in 1980 and is based in New Delhi, India.
